title: my go-to glowy summer makeup look | GET READY WITH ME
description:
Hi everyone! I’m so excited to be back with another makeup tutorial video showing you all my go-to summer makeup look with the new Veil Hydrating Skin Tint from Hourglass. It’s so simple and leaves my skin looking natural, dewy, and glowy. Watch to see exactly how I achieve this look that I'll be doing all summer long! 

Thank you to Hourglass Cosmetics for sponsoring this video! Click below to shop:
